prompt.name: translation
prompt.text: Translate to French: 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.'

baseline_context.retained_speed_row: B=1, chain_attn_mode=decode_batched, graph_mode=off, cap65536, exact D32 9/9, 1.018x AR, 14.173 ms/cycle
baseline_context.blocked_gate: D64 translation forks at generated token index 34
baseline_context.previous_diagnostic: cycle 1 post-commit selected verifier state differs from serial AR while visible output still matches and scratch-to-resident copy is exact

commands.c1_loop_selected_state_vs_ar: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_state_drift_audit.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode c1_loop --graph-mode off --compare-after-cycles 1,2 --max-cycles 2 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-state-drift-audit-c1loop-cycles1-2-20260613.json
commands.c1_loop_tree_tloop_selected_state_vs_ar: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_VERIFY_CHAIN_LINEAR_TLOOP=0 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_state_drift_audit.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode c1_loop --graph-mode off --compare-after-cycles 1,2 --max-cycles 2 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-state-drift-audit-c1loop-tree-tloop-cycles1-2-20260613.json
commands.cycle1_clean_verifier_compare: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_layer_drift_audit.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode c1_loop --graph-mode off --compare-cycle 1 --compare-rows 0,1 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-layer-drift-cycle1-c1loop-20260613.json

interpretation: Switching full-attention verification from decode_batched to c1_loop does not remove the cycle-1 serial-AR state mismatch. Disabling chain_tloop and forcing tree_tloop for linear attention also does not remove it. However, a cycle-1 verifier-vs-clean-verifier comparison is bit-clean for pre-verify resident state, hidden taps across all 40 layers and both rows, selected linear scratch, selected full-attention K/V cells, target top1, and top1 values. The verifier producer is internally deterministic and session-clean at cycle 1, but its selected state is not bit-equivalent to the serial c1 decode producer state.
next_action: Focus the next correctness unit on parity between serial c1 layer producers and verifier t-loop/row producer state. Start with linear layer 0 recurrent: compare run_linear_attention_moe_c1_layer_fp16 / run_linear_attention_out_proj_fp16 against run_linear_attention_moe_chain_tloop_layer_fp16 and run_linear_attention_moe_tree_tloop_layer_fp16 for the same row. Then inspect full-attention layer 3 K/V cell parity after the preceding hidden/state input is controlled.
